The "play You Spin Me Round while something is spinning" joke is so old it's basically a genre staple. It essentially plays on the listener having already seen that joke before and recognizing the song by the instrumental alone! A joke that only works because it's an old joke.
Idk I just love something about that.

text:
In all seriousness if you're quitting your job, I hope it goes well - make sure you're still investing a little for retirement over time, and if relying on video/patreon revenue, make sure you're getting a thorough understanding of how much you owe in taxes at the end of the year. That's often something employers handle for you. I only say this knowing that it's sometimes only the top 1% of the 1% of content creators that can entirely self-fund off of ad revenue.
(Also: Don't know if you have this already, but consider spreading content to multiple platforms, so that if something happens to the YouTube channel, you have other possibilities)

But today, I'm here to talk to you about something even more important: the future of our great country. Now, I know what you're thinking. "Billy, what does OxiClean have to do with running for president?" Well, let me tell you. OxiClean is all about getting rid of stains, right? And that's exactly what I want to do for our country. I want to clean up the mess that's been left behind by politicians who care more about their own interests than the interests of the American people. And speaking of cleaning up messes, let me tell you about Kaboom. This stuff can make even the dirtiest surfaces sparkle like new. And that's exactly what I want to do for America - to scrub away the grime and corruption that's been holding us back and reveal the shining potential of our great nation. But I'm still not done! Let me talk to you about Mighty Putty. This stuff can fix just about anything, from leaky pipes to broken furniture. And that's exactly what we need in a president: someone who can fix the problems that have been plaguing our country for far too long. But it's not just about fixing what's broken. It's also about making things shine. And that's where Orange Glo comes in. This stuff can make even the dullest surfaces shine like new. And that's exactly what I want to do for America. I want to make our country shine again, to show the world what we're truly capable of. So there you have it, America. I may be known for selling products on TV, but today I'm here to sell you on something even more important: a brighter future for our country. So join me, Billy Mays, in my campaign for president.
